project_request: Real-time monitoring dashboard for AI model performance with latency, cost, and alerting.

questions.question: What should the default dashboard layout look like?
questions.answer: Tab-based with Overview showing key metrics and tabs for deep-dives

questions.question: What chart types should be used for time-series data?
options: Line + area + heatmaps for error distribution
questions.answer: Line + area charts with heatmaps for error distribution

questions.question: How should alert configuration be presented?
options: Form with preview of alert condition
questions.answer: Simple form with a live preview showing where the threshold sits on the current chart

questions.question: Should the dashboard be responsive for mobile?
options: Full mobile support with dedicated mobile layout
questions.answer: Responsive but simplified on mobile — charts stack vertically, alerts still actionable
